name: PSI Market Regime Classification
description: Taxonomy of market regime labels used by the PSI (Pressure-Signal Index) system for the SET (Stock Exchange of Thailand) market.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Bullish
hasDefinedTerm.description: Strong positive intraday return with broad-based market strength.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Bearish
hasDefinedTerm.description: Consistent intraday decline with weak closing relative to ATO.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Sideways
hasDefinedTerm.description: Low directional movement in a range-bound trading session.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Risk-Off
hasDefinedTerm.description: Defensive behavior with increased volatility and negative bias.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Crisis
hasDefinedTerm.description: Sharp downside move with extreme volatility spike.
